data.title: Robinhood reaches new heights as cryptocurrencies gain mainstream traction with Walmart, Samsung, and CME enabling 24/7 trading.
data.description: The trading platform Robinhood has reached record highs as the popularity of cryptocurrencies surges, with mainstream support coming from major companies like Walmart, Samsung, and CME. These companies are embracing cryptocurrency trading with plans for 24/7 availability, indicating a shift towards wider acceptance of digital assets. Robinhood's success is evident in its soaring numbers, indicating a growing interest in crypto trading among investors.

data.title: Canoe EIT Income Fund (TSX - EIT.UN) declares $0.10 monthly distribution for October 2025. Record date: Oct 22, payouts on Nov 14.
data.description: Calgary-based Canoe EIT Income Fund (TSX: EIT.UN) has declared a monthly distribution of $0.10 per unit for October 2025. Investors registered on October 22, 2025, will be eligible for this distribution, scheduled to be paid out on November 14, 2025.

data.title: Azitra receives notice of non-compliance from NYSE American; important date: Oct. 3, 2025; stock symbol: AZTR.
data.description: On October 3, 2025, a biopharmaceutical company named Azitra, Inc. (NYSE American: AZTR) based in Branford, Connecticut, revealed that they have been notified by the staff of NYSE American LLC about something significant. They specialize in creating advanced treatments for precision dermatology.

data.title: CenterPoint Energy, Inc. to hold Third Quarter earnings conference call on October 23, 2025, at 7:00 a.m. Central time.
data.description: On Thursday, October 23, 2025, CenterPoint Energy, Inc. (NYSE: CNP) will hold a conference call at 7:00 a.m. Central/8:00 a.m. Eastern to review their Third Quarter results.

data.title: Elastic (NYSE: ESTC) named leader in 2025 Cognitive Search Evaluation, Elasticsearch scored highest in 8 criteria.
data.description: In San Francisco, Elastic (NYSE: ESTC) has been recognized as a leader in The Forrester Wave™ Cognitive Search Platforms, Q4 2025 report. Elasticsearch, a popular open-source document and vector database, scored the highest in eight key criteria, especially in relevancy. Elasticsearch provides developers with a robust search and analytics engine suitable for generative AI applications due to its speed and scalability. It is widely deployed and praised for its ability to manage structured and unstructured data effectively.

data.title: 6,000 Union Pacific locomotive engineers agree to new contract, including raises and improved benefits with BLET.
data.description: Approximately 6,000 locomotive engineers working for Union Pacific, and represented by the Brotherhood of Locomotive Engineers and Trainmen (BLET) of the Teamsters Rail Conference, have successfully negotiated for raises and improved benefits. This achievement was announced in Independence, Ohio, on October 3, 2025.

data.title: Nexus Industrial REIT (TSX: NXR.UN) to release Q3 results on Nov. 13, 2025 for quarter ended Sept 30, 2025.
data.description: On October 3, 2025, Nexus Industrial REIT (TSX: NXR.UN) shared plans to disclose its financial performance for the third quarter of 2025, concluding on September 30. The report is scheduled to be revealed before the TSX opens on Thursday, November 13, 2025.

data.title: Mike Moore has been promoted to Chief Operating Officer at Hertz.
data.description: In the latest report, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.5%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. This improvement has resulted in over 250,000 new jobs being added to the economy. Additionally, the stock market saw a major increase, with the S&P 500 reaching an all-time high of 4,200 points. This positive economic growth is a promising sign for the country's recovery from the recent downturn. Experts are optimistic about the future outlook and anticipate further progress in the coming months.

data.title: Bitcoin has surged to over $122,000. Anthony Pompliano shared stats about investing $1,200 stimulus check into BTC for huge returns, highlighting the value of investing over spending. The article discusses the impact of investing stimulus money into Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies during the COVID-19 pandemic.
data.description: Bitcoin has surged in value, reaching over $122,000 and nearing all-time highs set in August. Investor Anthony Pompliano highlighted the changing valuation of the dollar by pointing out that investing stimulus checks into Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Dogecoin resulted in significant returns for those who did not need the money for essentials during the pandemic. He shared a statistic on how investing the first $1,200 stimulus check into Bitcoin would yield significant returns. Pompliano emphasized the difference between investing and spending, noting that investors benefit in a K-shaped economy. Those who turned their stimulus money into assets like Bitcoin were rewarded. JPMorgan has raised its year-end Bitcoin price target to $165,000. The article on Benzinga.com delves into investing stimulus checks and the impact on consumers and the economy.

data.title: Floor & Decor opens new Murfreesboro store at 1230 Beasie Rd. In Tennessee with 35 full-time, 15 part-time staff. Jeneva Hurst leads.
data.description: Atlanta-based company, Floor & Decor (NYSE: FND), known for its hard-surface flooring products, has unveiled its latest warehouse in Murfreesboro, TN. Situated at 1230 Beasie Road, the new location boasts a team of around 35 full-time and 15 part-time employees. Overseeing operations is Jeneva Hurst, the Chief Executive Merchant. Floor & Decor, a rapidly expanding retail chain, specializes in catering to both homeowners and professionals with a focus on flooring solutions.

data.title: Nordicus Partners Corp. forms NoviThera ApS to develop Monoclonal antibody for psoriasis treatment.
data.description: In Beverly Hills, California, on October 3, 2025, Nordicus Partners Corporation (OTCQB: NORD), a financial consulting firm focusing on assisting Nordic and U.S. life sciences enterprises in entering the U.S. market, revealed the establishment of a new entity called NoviThera Aps ("NoviThera"). The primary goal of this new venture is to conduct research and create a new Monoclonal Antibody (MaB) intended as an innovative treatment for psoriasis.

data.title: Coeur Mining to present at upcoming conferences. CEO to present at John Tumazos Very Independent Research Virtual Metals Conference on Oct 7, 2025.
data.description: A company based in Chicago, Coeur Mining, Inc. (NYSE: CDE), shared details about their executives' participation in upcoming investor conferences. Mitchell J. Krebs, the Chairman, President, and CEO, is set to present at the John Tumazos Very Independent Research Virtual Metals Conference on October 7, 2025. Additionally, Thomas S. Whelan, the Senior VP and CFO, along with another Senior VP and Chief Officer will also be in attendance. This information was disclosed today by the company.
